# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.

Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection. Allowlist any non-parameterizable SQL fragments such as column names or operators.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php
function generateAdminReport($filters = []) {
    $pdo = new PDO('mysql:host=localhost;dbname=your_database', $username, $password);
    $pdo->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE, PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION);
    
    $allowedColumns = ['status', 'category', 'created_at'];
    $allowedOperators = ['=', '!=', '>', '<', '>=', '<=', 'LIKE'];
    $allowedStatuses = ['active', 'inactive', 'pending', 'completed'];
    $allowedCategories = ['electronics', 'clothing', 'books', 'home'];
    
    $whereConditions = [];
    $params = [];
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_from']) && !empty($filters['date_to'])) {
        $whereConditions[] = "created_at BETWEEN :date_from AND :date_to";
        $params['date_from'] = $filters['date_from'];
        $params['date_to'] = $filters['date_to'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['status']) && in_array($filters['status'], $allowedStatuses)) {
        $whereConditions[] = "status = :status";
        $params['status'] = $filters['status'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['category']) && in_array($filters['category'], $allowedCategories)) {
        $whereConditions[] = "category = :category";
        $params['category'] = $filters['category'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['custom_filters']) && is_array($filters['custom_filters'])) {
        foreach ($filters['custom_filters'] as $filter) {
            $column = $filter['column'] ?? '';
            $operator = $filter['operator'] ?? '=';
            $value = $filter['value'] ?? '';
            
            if (in_array($column, $allowedColumns) && in_array($operator, $allowedOperators)) {
                $paramName = 'custom_' . count($params);
                $whereConditions[] = "$column $operator :$paramName";
                $params[$paramName] = $value;
            }
        }
    }
    
    $sql = "SELECT * FROM reports WHERE 1=1";
    
    if (!empty($whereConditions)) {
        $sql .= " AND " . implode(" AND ", $whereConditions);
    }
    
    $sql .= " ORDER BY created_at DESC";
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    $stmt->execute($params);
    
    return $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
}
?>
